note: Reference manifest for Alfred tools and plugins. setup.ps1 reads requirements/python-requirements.txt and requirements/npm-tools.txt directly; keep this file in sync when adding tools via learning mode.

packages.description: Power BI CLI for Claude Code
packages.purpose: Visual creation/editing in Power BI Desktop — 13 Claude Code skills. Run 'pbi connect' with Desktop open.
Show a desktop notification when a long Claude Code or Codex task completes.
Create and polish DOCX reports, proposals, briefs, and templates.
Create PPTX slide decks from analysis, outlines, data, and screenshots.
Extract, inspect, split, merge, and compare PDF content.
Read and write XLSX files when Excel is not open or MCP is not needed.
Clean, reshape, join, summarize, and export tabular data for Excel, Power BI, and reports.

tools.purpose: CLAUDE_EXECUTION routing provider and MCP runtime
Codex routing provider for implementation, refactors, tests, and Alfred self-improvement

tools.name: powerbi-modeling-mcp
tools.purpose: Edit Power BI data models — measures, columns, tables, relationships

tools.name: brave-search
tools.purpose: Live web search — real-time results, latest docs, current versions

tools.name: github
tools.purpose: GitHub operations — create PRs, manage issues, search repos, push files

tools.name: playwright
tools.purpose: Browser automation — navigate pages, fill forms, scrape data, take screenshots

tools.name: filesystem
tools.purpose: Scoped local file access for controlled PC operator workflows
tools.notes: Must be launched with explicit allowed directories only.

tools.name: memory
tools.purpose: Persistent knowledge graph memory across Alfred sessions and projects
tools.notes: Store under Alfred memory/, never in committed secrets.

tools.name: fetch
tools.purpose: Clean web page fetching and HTML-to-Markdown conversion for docs and research

tools.name: git
tools.purpose: Repository inspection, history, diffs, and local git operations

tools.name: sequential-thinking
tools.purpose: Structured multi-step reasoning for complex Office, BI, and PC operator tasks

tools.name: time
tools.purpose: Time and timezone conversion for scheduling and automation context

quant_intelligence.description: Live trading analysis engine: 8-signal edge model, paper trading, institutional flow, alerts, and learning feedback
